subcodes.first_line: The world hath been deprived of the presence of the All-Knowing by the veils of the learned, even as thou hast become aware [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم را حجبات اهل علم از حضرت معلوم محروم نموده چنانچه آنجناب آگاه شدند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @call to action, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition
